description_long: This is a classic school or lecture hall chair with an integrated writing tablet. The chair features a sturdy metal frame with four tubular legs and a wire rack beneath the seat for storage. The seat and backrest are made of wood with a warm brown finish, while the seat cushion is upholstered in a dark gray fabric for added comfort. The attached writing surface is made of matching wood and is supported by metal rods, extending from the right side of the chair. The overall design is utilitarian and functional, suitable for educational or training environments. The materials and construction suggest durability and ease of maintenance.
description: A school or lecture chair with a wooden backrest, cushioned seat, and an attached wooden writing tablet on a metal frame. Includes a wire storage rack beneath the seat.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden writing tablet extended on the right and the wire storage rack beneath the seat.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wooden backrest, writing tablet, and cushioned seat.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the seat and backrest, with the writing tablet visible from the left.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the wooden backrest, metal frame, and wire storage rack.
